query: SELECT estabelecimentoId, COUNT(*) as total, LEFT(competencia, 7) as mes_ano FROM faturadoTasy GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, LEFT(competencia, 7) ORDER BY estabelecimentoId, mes_ano;
